'''gazapa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:prac|prac]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-z-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:prac|prac]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| gazapa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæzæpæth|gæzæpæth]] || [[word:gæzæpæj|gæzæpæj]] || [[word:gæzæpæsh|gæzæpæsh]] || [[word:gæzæpæ|gæzæpæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gazazapath|gazazapath]] || [[word:gazazapaj|gazazapaj]] || [[word:gazazapash|gazazapash]] || [[word:gazazapa|gazazapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gazapath|gazapath]] || [[word:gazapaj|gazapaj]] || [[word:gazapash|gazapash]] || [[word:gazapa|gazapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gazafpath|gazafpath]] || [[word:gazafpaj|gazafpaj]] || [[word:gazafpash|gazafpash]] || [[word:gazafpaf|gazafpaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gazapatha|gazapatha]] || [[word:gazapaja|gazapaja]] || [[word:gazapasha|gazapasha]] || [[word:gazapaka|gazapaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gazapath|gazapath]] || [[word:gazapaj|gazapaj]] || [[word:gazapash|gazapash]] || [[word:gazapa|gazapa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gazapathal|gazapathal]] || [[word:gazapajal|gazapajal]] || [[word:gazapashal|gazapashal]] || [[word:gazapakal|gazapakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gazapathatha|gazapathatha]] || [[word:gazapajaja|gazapajaja]] || [[word:gazapashasha|gazapashasha]] || [[word:gazapaka|gazapaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gazapathan|gazapathan]] || [[word:gazapajan|gazapajan]] || [[word:gazapashan|gazapashan]] || [[word:gazapakan|gazapakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gazapathaoro|gazapathaoro]] || [[word:gazapajaoro|gazapajaoro]] || [[word:gazapashaoro|gazapashaoro]] || [[word:gazapakaoro|gazapakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
